evidence_paragraphs.snippet: [Daenerys](wiki:Daenerys_Targaryen) looks out for the first time onto the vast, empty, flat plain of the [Dothraki sea](wiki:Dothraki_sea) with Ser [Jorah Mormont](wiki:Jorah_Mormont) beside her....

[Daenerys](wiki:Daenerys_Targaryen) looks out for the first time onto the vast, empty, flat plain of the [Dothraki sea](wiki:Dothraki_sea) with Ser [Jorah Mormont](wiki:Jorah_Mormont) beside her....

As she enters her tent, Daenerys sees a finger of light touch her dragon eggs and, for a moment, she sees scarlet flames before her eyes. When she touches the eggs they feel hot, which she attributes...

Daenerys is amazed that she hit Viserys and asks Jorah if she has woken the dragon in Viserys. Jorah replies her brother Rhaegar was the last Dragon, while Viserys is less than the shadow of a snake....
